description: Official FENZ operational and annual incident data retrieval
source_name: Fire and Emergency New Zealand incident reports
freshness: seven-day operational feed and annual incident downloads
warnings: Do not expose details beyond those FENZ publishes.
Preliminary operational labels are not final classifications.
Absence from the public feed does not prove no incident occurred.
No notification or dispatch function is provided.

record_fields.classification_status: operational rows are preliminary; annual rows follow metadata definitions

annual.help: aggregate an official annual incident dataset

trend.help: aggregate official annual datasets for a region
